texto: By giving the public a rich and full melody, distinctly arranged and well played, all the time creating new tone colors and patterns, I feel we have a better chance of being successful. I want a kick to my band, but I don't want the rhythm to hog the spotlight.
explicacao: Citação de Glenn Miller sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “By giving the public a rich and full melody, distinctly arranged and well played, all the time cr…” articula sucesso, time, colors em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como colors e giving.
